stemHtml: An aircraft with radio communications failure is taxiing. The pilot notices a steady red light. After a while this light is followed by a flashing green light. What is the meaning of these signals?

options.a: Steady red: Stop; Flashing green: Cleared to taxi.
options.b: Steady red: Taxi clear of runway; Flashing green: Cleared to taxi.
options.c: Steady red: Stop; Flashing green: Return to apron.
options.d: Steady red: Taxi clear of runway; Flashing green: Cleared for take-off.
